title: Skills Export
description: Schema for skills.json produced by the OSRS Data Exporter RuneLite plugin.

dataType.description: Identifies this payload as a skills snapshot.

accountHash.description: The unique account hash identifying the player, obtained from the RuneLite client API.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the snapshot was taken (e.g. '2026-04-21T12:00:00Z').

skills.description: All skills at the time of the snapshot.

skillEntry.title: SkillEntry
skillEntry.description: A single skill in the skills snapshot.

skillName.description: The display name of the skill (e.g. 'Attack', 'Woodcutting').

xp.description: Total accumulated XP in this skill.

level.description: The real (unmodified) level of this skill (1-99, or up to 120 for skills that support it).
